item.title: xAI joins SpaceX
item.description: SpaceX announced today that it has acquired xAI.

item.title: Grok Imagine API
item.description: State-of-the-art video generation across quality, cost, and latency.

item.title: xAI Raises $20B Series E
item.description: xAI is rapidly accelerating its progress in building advanced AI.

item.title: Introducing Grok Business and Grok Enterprise
item.description: The best assistant in the world is now Enterprise ready.

item.title: Supporting the DOW's mission with AI
item.description: xAI is proud to be selected by the US Department of War to deliver Frontier AI

item.title: Grok Collections API
item.description: State-of-the-art RAG system built directly into our API.

item.title: Grok Voice Agent API
item.description: Bringing the power of Grok Voice to all developers.

item.title: xAI and El Salvador Pioneer the World's First Nationwide AI Education Program
item.description: Announcing Our Transformative Partnership with the Government of El Salvador.

item.title: Grok goes Global with KSA
item.description: Announcing Our Landmark Partnership with Saudi Arabia and HUMAIN

item.title: Grok 4.1 Fast and Agent Tools API
item.description: Bringing the next generation of tool-calling agents to the xAI API

item.title: Grok 4.1
item.description: Grok 4.1 is now available to all users on grok.com, 𝕏, and the iOS and Android apps. It is rolling out immediately in Auto mode and can be selected explicitly as “Grok 4.1” in the model picker.

item.title: Expanding xAI for Government with GSA OneGov
item.description: Expanding ‘xAI For Government’ with more accessible AI tools for the Federal Government

item.title: Grok 4 Fast
item.description: Pushing the Frontier of Cost-Efficient Intelligence

item.title: Grok Code Fast 1
item.description: We're thrilled to introduce grok-code-fast-1, a speedy and economical reasoning model that excels at agentic coding.

item.title: Announcing xAI for Government
item.description: We are excited to announce xAI For Government – a suite of frontier AI products available first to United States Government customers.

item.title: Grok 4
item.description: Grok 4 is the most intelligent model in the world. It includes native tool use and real-time search integration, and is available now to SuperGrok and Premium+ subscribers, as well as through the xAI API. We are also introducing a new SuperGrok Heavy tier with access to Grok 4 Heavy - the most powerful version of Grok 4.

item.title: Grok 3 Beta — The Age of Reasoning Agents
item.description: We are thrilled to unveil an early preview of Grok 3, our most advanced model yet, blending superior reasoning with extensive pretraining knowledge.

item.title: xAI raises $6B Series C
item.description: We are partnering with A16Z, Blackrock, Fidelity Management & Research Company, Kingdom Holdings, Lightspeed, MGX, Morgan Stanley, OIA, QIA, Sequoia Capital, Valor Equity Partners and Vy Capital, amongst others.

item.title: Bringing Grok to Everyone
item.description: Grok is now faster, sharper, and has improved multilingual support. It is available to everyone on the 𝕏 platform.

item.title: Grok Image Generation Release
item.description: We are updating Grok's capabilities with a new autoregressive image generation model, code-named Aurora, available on the 𝕏 platform.

item.title: API Public Beta
item.description: Starting today, developers can build on our Grok foundation models using our newly released API. We will run a public beta program until the end of 2024 during which everyone will get $25 of free API credits per month.

item.title: Grok-2 Beta Release
item.description: We announce our new Grok-2 and Grok-2 mini models.

item.title: Series B funding round
item.description: xAI is pleased to announce our series B funding round of $6 billion.

item.title: Grok-1.5 Vision Preview
item.description: Connecting the digital and physical worlds with our first multimodal model.

item.title: Announcing Grok-1.5
item.description: Grok-1.5 comes with improved reasoning capabilities and a context length of 128,000 tokens. Available on 𝕏 soon.

item.title: Open Release of Grok-1
item.description: We are releasing the weights and architecture of our 314 billion parameter Mixture-of-Experts model Grok-1.

item.title: Announcing PromptIDE
item.description: Integrated development environment for prompt engineering and interpretability research.

item.title: Announcing Grok
item.description: Grok is an AI modeled after the Hitchhiker’s Guide to the Galaxy. It is intended to answer almost anything and, far harder, even suggest what questions to ask!
